message:
feat(collections): Implement collections.abc marker types properly

Replace deleted stub file with proper ABC marker structs. Each ABC type
now has:
- __abstractmethods__ field listing required methods
- register() method for Mapping (ABC virtual subclass registration)

Types implemented: Hashable, Awaitable, Coroutine, AsyncIterable,
AsyncIterator, AsyncGenerator, Iterable, Iterator, Reversible,
Generator, Container, Sized, Callable, Collection, Sequence,
MutableSequence, ByteString, Set, MutableSet, Mapping, MutableMapping,
MappingView, KeysView, ValuesView, ItemsView
